other_observers: Brent Thordarson.; I observed this bird before knowing anyone else had seen it. However, I believe Nick Komar saw this bird before I did on the same day.
description: Compared to nearby Ring-billed Gulls, thinner bill. Dark eye. White crescents visible on back. Brownish around head and neck.Behaviors: Walking on ice very close to north edge of Sheldon Lake.Call: Did not call.Plumage: Adult nonbreeding
